title: Mailchimp vs HubSpot (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Mailchimp vs HubSpot: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Mailchimp and HubSpot comes down to your specific use case. Mailchimp is built for beginners and small businesses, while HubSpot targets businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on beginners and small businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Mailchimp wins for beginners and small businesses, while HubSpot is stronger for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or HubSpot?
faq.a: Mailchimp starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from HubSpot to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
